creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note there seems to be an update to procmail at https://github.com/BuGlessRB/procmail/  -  which seems to be a hit & run action.

But also note that Debian is not currently accepting it into its distribution according to https://tracker.debian.org/pkg/procmail because it regresses, see https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=1028356

Please carefully look if that's a worthwhile update for FreeBSD. 

I am not touching this with a 10 foot pole, and am not using it, so I am not doing it, just forwarding the news.
